hero.title: Packers & Movers in West Bengal
hero.subtitle: Kolkata to Durgapur, Siliguri to Asansol — 5,510+ verified movers across 17 cities in West Bengal.

intro:
West Bengal stretches from the Darjeeling Himalayas to the Sundarbans delta, encompassing one of India's largest and most culturally rich urban centres — Kolkata. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 5,510+ verified movers across Kolkata, Durgapur, Asansol, Siliguri, Jalpaiguri, Kharagpur, Barasat, Bardhaman and 9 more cities.

From Kolkata's historic British-era buildings and narrow North Calcutta lanes to Durgapur's industrial township and Siliguri's Northeast gateway position, our KYC-verified vendors handle every move with care and precision.
whyUs: Kolkata's tram lines, old lift buildings and monsoon flooding in low-lying areas require vendors with genuine local expertise. Our West Bengal movers plan around Kolkata's heritage structure guidelines, carry amphibious packing for monsoon moves, and provide ₹5 lakh coverage with GPS tracking.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in West Bengal?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within West Bengal cities start at ₹3,500. Kolkata local 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹7,000–₹13,000. Kolkata to Siliguri inter-city moves cost ₹10,000–₹18,000.

faqs.q: Which cities in West Bengal does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We cover 17 cities including Kolkata, Durgapur, Asansol, Siliguri, Jalpaiguri, Kharagpur, Barasat, Barrackpore, Burdwan, Murshidabad, Darjeeling, Chandernagore and more.

faqs.q: Do you handle Kolkata's old building and heritage property moves?
faqs.a: Yes. Our Kolkata vendors have experience with old hand-operated lifts, narrow staircases in heritage buildings, and coordination with Kolkata Municipal Corporation for large furniture removals.

faqs.q: Can you move goods to Northeast India through West Bengal?
faqs.a: Yes. West Bengal is the gateway to Northeast India. We offer moves from Kolkata and Siliguri to Assam, Meghalaya, Tripura and other northeastern states.
